headline: Warner Bros. Discovery Faces Antitrust Tests And Valuation Questions In Mega Merger
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery (NasdaqGS:WBD) and Paramount Skydance face multiple new antitrust lawsuits from consumers and Paramount+ subscribers targeting their proposed US$110b merger. Regulators in the U.S. and Europe are reviewing the deal, with European authorities reportedly more open to approval than U.S. counterparts. U.S. state attorneys general are preparing broader challenges focused on competition and labor impacts, adding uncertainty to the merger timeline and outcome. For you as a...
